title: Toggle Scoreboard
description: Simply hide or show the scoreboard !
body:
![Toggle Scoreboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/741e26e11dd1a0fe1d440ffc8aceef04186fd5d4.png)

Hide the **sidebar scoreboard** instantly with one key. Cleaner HUD, fewer distractions — toggle it on the fly while you play. --- ### ✨ Why this mod? - Less visual clutter in PvP, minigames, and busy hubs - Calmer footage for recordings/streams - Instant toggle — no digging through menus --- ## ⚡ Features - Toggle the **sidebar scoreboard** visibility in real time - Default keybind: `O` --- ### 💬 Controls | Input | Action | |--------|--------| | **O** | Toggle sidebar scoreboard (default) | Rebind in **Options → Controls** like any other key. --- ### 🛠️ Compatibility - **Side:** Client - **Loaders:** Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge - **Game:** Java Edition **1.11.2** through **26.1.x** - **Dependencies:** **Fabric API** on **Fabric** builds only --- ### 💙 Perfect for Survival · SMP · minigames · crowded servers · streaming sessions
